_meta.purpose: Verified Cunard fleet data for ship page repairs

sources.tier3_compiled: CruiseRadio, World of Cruising, Chris Frame's Cunard Page, Wikipedia
sources.methodology: Each IMO verified from VesselFinder + at least one additional source. GT from VesselFinder. Guest/crew from World of Cruising cross-referenced with Wikipedia.

queen-anne.name: Queen Anne
queen-anne.imo_discrepancy: WRONG: Page has 9930928, correct is 9839399. No maritime source lists 9930928.

queen-elizabeth.name: Queen Elizabeth
queen-elizabeth.imo_discrepancy: Page has TBD — ship has sailed since 2010
queen-elizabeth.gt_source: VesselFinder (90,901). Page says 90,900. CruiseRadio says 90,400. Using VesselFinder as Tier 2.
queen-elizabeth.gt_discrepancy: Page 90,900 vs VesselFinder 90,901 — 1 GT difference, likely rounding. LEAVE AS-IS.
queen-elizabeth.guests_source: World of Cruising (2,081) + CruiseRadio (2,092). Page has 2,081. LEAVE AS-IS — matches one authoritative source.
queen-elizabeth.crew_source: World of Cruising. Page says 1,005 — DISCREPANCY. World of Cruising says 911. Need third source.
queen-elizabeth.crew_note: Page 1,005 vs World of Cruising 911 — significant gap. Do NOT change without third verification source.

queen-mary-2.name: Queen Mary 2
queen-mary-2.guests_source: World of Cruising + Chris Frame (agree at 2,695). Page says 2,695. Correct.

queen-victoria.name: Queen Victoria
queen-victoria.guests_source: Wikipedia + World of Cruising (agree at 2,061). Page says 2,081 — DISCREPANCY.
queen-victoria.guests_discrepancy: Page 2,081 vs sources 2,061 — 20 guest difference. Sources agree. Will fix.
queen-victoria.crew_source: Wikipedia (913). Page says 981. DISCREPANCY — but Wikipedia is Tier 4. Need better source.
queen-victoria.crew_note: Page 981 vs Wikipedia 913. Do NOT change crew without Tier 1-2 verification.

crew_discrepancies_UNRESOLVED: queen-elizabeth: page=1,005, World of Cruising=911 — NOT changing without third source
queen-victoria: page=981, Wikipedia=913 — NOT changing without Tier 1-2 source
deliberate_non_changes: queen-elizabeth GT: page 90,900 vs VesselFinder 90,901 — 1 GT rounding difference, left as-is
queen-elizabeth crew: left at page value 1,005 pending third-source verification
queen-victoria crew: left at page value 981 pending Tier 1-2 verification
